description: Context7 provides up-to-date library and documentation context for developers and coding assistants. It indexes documentation sources and serves search, context retrieval, and MCP-based access to that content.
summary: Context7 exposes a bearer-authenticated HTTP API at `https://context7.com/api`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.context7.com/mcp` with API-key or MCP OAuth auth, and a `ctx7` npm CLI that can authenticate via OAuth device flow or an API key.
